message:
Fix bugs in Session flush implementation

Bug fixes:
- add() now updates stored values when object already tracked (was using stale values)
- Add mark_dirty() method so users can trigger UPDATEs (was impossible before)
- Fix dirty checking consistency: serialize values not objects in get()/load_lazy()
  (was comparing struct JSON vs Vec<Value> JSON, always seeing objects as dirty)

Related improvements (from other agent):
- RelatedMany::link/unlink now prevent duplicates
- Added poisoned mutex recovery in relationship.rs
- Added debug assertions in flush.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
